verbatim_quote: So we're going to have to have domain experts in these fields help us figure out what things they actually care about and things we can actually evaluate on reasonably. And of course, there are folks here at Cornell, and for instance, the Laboratory for Plasma Studies, who might be helpful for figuring out what to do for FlexAgen in particular.
